title: Ghibli Countergenre
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for countergenre style transfer: hard sci-fi, apocalypse, finance, and cyberpunk scenes recast through a gentle hand-painted animated-film language.

en.title: Ghibli Countergenre
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for countergenre style transfer: hard sci-fi, apocalypse, finance, and cyberpunk scenes recast through a gentle hand-painted animated-film language.

zh-CN.title: Ghibli 反题材
zh-CN.description: 以温柔手绘动画电影语汇重写硬核科幻、末日废墟、金融交易和赛博朋克场景的反题材风格迁移主题。
